benefits.description: Anti-aging, healing of scars, protection of hair/hairline

protocol_notes: Taking 10mg GHK-Cu year-round. Also on HGH, megadose vitamin C (10g daily), daily zinc. Recently added 12mg Astaxanthin (California Gold Astalif) with 20mg Lutein and 1mg Zeaxanthin for past 2 months. Considering bumping Astaxanthin to 24mg but concerned about skin discoloration given Middle Eastern ethnicity. Not paranoid about copper toxicity.
